Acme-MENATech

The CRM that finally speaks your customers' language

Stop forcing your team to use Salesforce. Start using a CRM built for the Gulf.

Acme is the AI-native CRM for SMEs across UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the wider GCC. WhatsApp-first messaging. Arabic-native interface. Pricing that respects your runway.

Book a 20-min demo

Why 200+ MENA businesses chose Acme

  • WhatsApp messaging native (not bolted on)
  • Arabic interface from day 1
  • Tap + HyperPay payments wired
  • 40% lower cost than Salesforce
  • Setup in 4 days, not 4 months
"Acme replaced our Salesforce contract. Saved 60% in year one." — Ahmed Mansour, COO at GulfRetail Group
"الـ CRM الوحيد اللي يفهم طريقة شغلنا في الخليج" — Sara AlOtaibi, Sales Director at Riyadh Telecom Solutions

Pricing

Starter: from AED 99/month per seat. Custom enterprise pricing on request. Annual billing gets 2 months free.

No setup fees. No long contracts. Cancel anytime.

Trusted by

GulfRetail Group, Riyadh Telecom Solutions, Doha Medical Centers Network, Kuwait F&B Group, and 200+ more.

Built by founders who lived the pain

Layla Al-Rashid (CEO) spent 12 years at Cisco and Avaya leading enterprise sales across MENA. After watching her teams struggle with US-built tools that ignored how Gulf businesses actually work, she built Acme.

Acme was profiled in Khaleej Times in March 2026 as one of the top emerging Arabic SaaS companies in the GCC.

Ready to switch?
